contents.text: The Combat skill is leveled up by killing mobs. As the level increases, the bonus drop chance per killed mob also increases.

• Killing Zombies
• Killing Creepers
• Killing Skeletons
• Killing Spiders
• Killing Witches
• Killing Endermen

As the level increases, the bonus drop chance per killed mob also increases. Higher levels unlock more drops from the Combat Bonus Loot Table. Some mobs have adjusted loot tables and drop resources that would otherwise be unreachable in Skyblock.
 
The corresponding tool is the Element Sword:
• Common: +50% Drop-Chance
• Uncommon: +100%
• Further levels increase the multiplier even more
 
Blueprints for upgrades drop when leveling up.
XP Boost via the Catch-Up System:
Players who are far behind the server leader automatically receive more XP per action. More information in the Catch-Up System tab.
